action: Crash-resume protocol is structurally broken: the cycle-state.json checkpoint block only survives between a phase's post-completion write and the NEXT phase's pre-dispatch write. Sequence in core.RunCycle: (1) post-phase WriteCycleState marshals core.CycleState — which has NO Checkpoint field (go/internal/core/ports.go:141) — via writeJSONAtomic whole-file replace (go/internal/adapters/storage/statejson.go:59), erasing any prior checkpoint block; (2) PhaseBoundaryCheckpointer re-adds the block (go/internal/core/orchestrator.go:2605, go/internal/checkpoint/checkpoint.go:229 ApplyToStateFile read-merge-write); (3) the next phase's PRE-dispatch WriteCycleState (cs.Phase=next) clobbers it again. Net effect: any crash/SIGKILL/host-reboot that lands while a phase is RUNNING (i.e. almost always) leaves no checkpoint, and `evolve loop --resume` fails with 'no live checkpoint: cycle-state.json has no checkpoint block'. Observed live: host reboot during cycle-294 mutation-gate (2026-06-11) — 8 completed phases, populated cycle-state.json, zero checkpoint; operator had to hand-synthesize the block (reason=operator-requested, resumeFromPhase=audit) to recover. Fix direction (pick one, single-source): (a) make FilesystemStorage.WriteCycleState checkpoint-preserving — read existing file, carry the 'checkpoint' key through the rewrite (mirror ApplyToStateFile's read-merge-write); or (b) add Checkpoint *checkpoint.Checkpoint `json:"checkpoint,omitempty"` to core.CycleState so the struct round-trips the block (watch the core->checkpoint import cycle — may need the block as json.RawMessage in core); or (c) move the checkpointer call BEFORE the pre-dispatch write and have the pre-dispatch write merge. Also note Compose uses cs.Phase at the post-phase boundary, so resumeFromPhase records the just-COMPLETED phase (resume re-runs it) — decide and pin intended semantics while in there. Secondary finding: core.Phase.IsValid (go/internal/core/phase.go:38) rejects inserted/optional phases (e.g. mutation-gate), so RunCycleFromPhase cannot resume FROM an inserted phase — checkpoint writer should record the next SPINE phase, or IsValid/resume must accept catalog phases. Acceptance: test that (1) writes a checkpoint, runs a pre-dispatch WriteCycleState, and asserts the block survives; (2) SIGKILLs a synthetic cycle mid-phase and asserts LoadResumeState returns a usable ResumePoint with a spine-valid resumeFromPhase.
evidence_pointer: go/internal/adapters/storage/statejson.go:59 (whole-struct replace); go/internal/core/orchestrator.go:2599-2609 (write-then-checkpoint order); go/internal/core/resume.go:85 (failure msg); .evolve/runs/cycle-294/ + evolve-batch-soak6r-20260612.log (live failure 2026-06-12)
